selection_rationale: composition import; CO benefit issuance; backfill

corpus_release.note: r0 manifest lives on branch release-r0-manifest (open PR at probe time); not yet merged to corpus main. Git commit 9ee50de is the corpus tree the manifest covers.

model.configured_default_reason: codex CLI vendored binary missing (ENOENT at ~/.bun/install/global/node_modules/@openai/codex-darwin-arm64/vendor/.../codex); and gpt-5.5 is not exposed by the available OpenAI key (max is gpt-5.2). claude backend (opus) 401s from the nested CLI in this environment.
model.executed_rationale: openai backend calls the OpenAI Responses API directly with the account key (HTTP 200 verified); gpt-5.2 is the current frontier OpenAI model available on this key and the closest faithful substitute for the configured gpt-5.5.

schema_version.note: A1 published JSON Schemas (schemas/rulespec-module.v1.schema.json) are NOT materialized on the engine HEAD used at probe time; commit 092f14b is not an ancestor of current engine main. schema_version is therefore pinned to the engine package version + git commit that actually compiled/validated the modules.

registry_version.note: The A3 40,991-concept corpus registry (corpus#171) is an open PR and NOT merged at r0. The registry the encode pipeline actually consumes for SNAP is the encode-side concept seed snap.yaml, pinned here by content hash.
